title: crotalaria cleomifolia
intro: Crotalaria cleomifolia, also known as the bushy rattlebox, is a plant species within the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce vomiting and act as a purgative. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as a diuretic. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Crotalaria cleomifolia have been made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments.
